parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH configured_fees AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    account_name,
    subscription_name,
    plan_name,
    plan_value          AS configured_fee,
    charge_model,
    effective_end_date
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.product_catalog`
  WHERE LOWER(plan_name) LIKE '%payment gateway%'
    AND effective_end_date > CURRENT_DATE()
),

invoiced_amounts AS (
  SELECT
    mongo_account_id    AS account_id,
    subscription_name,
    SUM(amount)         AS total_invoiced
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.invoice_items`
  WHERE invoice_item_created_at >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND LOWER(product_name) LIKE '%payment gateway%'
  GROUP BY mongo_account_id, subscription_name
)

SELECT
  cf.account_id,
  cf.account_name,
  cf.subscription_name,
  cf.plan_name,
  cf.configured_fee,
  ia.total_invoiced,
  ROUND(ia.total_invoiced - cf.configured_fee, 4) AS fee_delta,
  cf.charge_model,
  cf.effective_end_date
FROM configured_fees cf
JOIN invoiced_amounts ia
  ON cf.account_id = ia.account_id
  AND cf.subscription_name = ia.subscription_name
WHERE ROUND(ia.total_invoiced - cf.configured_fee, 4) != 0
ORDER BY ABS(ia.total_invoiced - cf.configured_fee) DESC

parameters.text:
=:white_check_mark: *Payment Gateway Fee Reconciliation* | {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

No fee mismatches found in the last 30 days. All configured fees match invoiced amounts.
